zh.site_subtitle: 个人博客 · 项目 · 笔记
zh.hero_title: 把系统、虚拟人和想法，持续地做出来，也写出来。
zh.hero_intro: 这是一个偏写作优先的个人博客框架。结构参考了几种非常成熟的个人博客写法：Paul Graham 的简洁文章流、Josh Comeau 的个人主页式入口，以及 swyx 的 About / Projects / Writing 分层。
zh.bio: 郭浩文，主要关注图形渲染、虚拟人交互、大模型应用工程，以及把想法真正做成可部署系统的过程。这里后续会持续更新项目记录、技术笔记、开发日志和随笔。
zh.now_text: 当前重点：把个人项目、技术文章和实验记录系统化整理出来，逐步形成稳定的个人表达空间。

about_sections.title: 关于我
about_sections.body: 我主要关注图形渲染、虚拟人交互、大模型应用工程，以及把想法真正做成可部署系统的过程。这个博客后续会逐步承接这些内容。

about_sections.title: 我会写什么
about_sections.body: 博客将主要记录项目复盘、技术实现、开发日志、个人想法，以及一些更长期的研究兴趣。

zh.projects_intro: 这里会逐步收录我认为值得长期维护和展示的项目。当前先保留最核心的两个入口，后面你只需要继续往 site.json 里追加项目即可。
zh.writing_intro: 这里是文章列表页。后续无论你写项目复盘、技术笔记、周记还是更个人化的随笔，都可以沿用同一套结构。

featured_projects.name: AIGril / AIGL
featured_projects.description: 一个基于浏览器的 3D 虚拟人项目，包含 VRM 渲染、动作表情联动、流式对话和记忆系统。

featured_projects.name: AI Safety API
featured_projects.description: 部署在同一 Render 服务中的内容安全审核接口，提供综合判定和多算法结果。

inspirations.name: Josh Comeau
inspirations.note: 首页像个人品牌入口，信息组织清晰

inspirations.name: swyx
inspirations.note: About / Projects / Writing 分层明确

en.hero_title: Building systems, avatars, and ideas in public.
en.hero_intro: This is a writing-first personal blog framework. The structure borrows from several mature blogs: the simplicity of Paul Graham, the strong homepage identity of Josh Comeau, and the About / Projects / Writing split used by swyx.
en.bio: HaoWen Guo works around graphics, virtual characters, AI application engineering, and the process of turning ideas into deployable systems. This blog will gradually collect project notes, technical writing, devlogs, and essays.
en.now_text: Current focus: turning personal projects, technical writing, and experimental notes into a stable long-term body of work.

about_sections.title: About me
about_sections.body: I work around graphics, virtual character systems, AI application engineering, and the process of turning ideas into something deployable. This blog is meant to hold that body of work over time.

about_sections.title: What I write about
about_sections.body: The writing here will mainly cover project breakdowns, implementation notes, devlogs, personal essays, and longer-term research interests.

en.projects_intro: This page will gradually collect the projects I want to maintain and present for the long term. For now it keeps the two most representative entries, and later you only need to append more items in site.json.
en.writing_intro: This is the archive page for writing. Whether you publish project breakdowns, technical notes, weekly logs, or more personal essays, they can all live in the same structure.

featured_projects.name: AIGril / AIGL
featured_projects.description: A browser-based 3D virtual companion project with VRM rendering, action/expression control, streaming chat, and memory.

featured_projects.name: AI Safety API
featured_projects.description: A safety moderation API deployed on the same Render backend, returning both aggregate decisions and per-algorithm results.

inspirations.name: Josh Comeau
inspirations.note: A homepage that works as a personal brand surface

inspirations.name: swyx
inspirations.note: Clear About / Projects / Writing information architecture
